summary: Iteration 16 — Frontend-only validation of PROJEXINO AppShell + Launchpad refactor (paginated 3D card deck + Intern Portal under same shell). Tested marketing Navbar, login header, intern launchpad cards & gating, admin pagination (16 cards/3 pages), drawer (no Marketing link), FAB Home, back arrow, no-vertical-scroll on Launchpad, search sheet, presence widget, intern chat single-pane, hot paths. 34/34 functional checks PASSED on the main run. Drawer test re-verified separately after toast cleared (4/4 PASS). No backend regressions observed during UI flows.

issues: Sonner 'Welcome back' success toast briefly overlaps the top-right action cluster (presence/search/notif/menu) and can intercept clicks for ~3s after login. Cosmetic, but caused 1 transient click miss in automation. Consider auto-dismiss <1500ms or reposition toast to top-center below status bar.

action_items: (Optional polish) Shorten 'Welcome back' toast duration or reposition so it doesn't overlap app-menu-btn / presence-toggle right after login.
(Console) Three.js Clock deprecation warning on /login — switch to THREE.Timer when convenient (non-blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: Launchpad.jsx correctly gates cards by role via CARDS_PORTAL[].roles + filter on user.role — intern variant uses CARDS_INTERN catalog (no role gating needed). 7 intern cards × PAGE_SIZE=6 = 2 pages with profile on p2 ✅.

AppShell.jsx isHome detection uses base = /intern | /m | /app and matches pathname OR trailing slash OR tail==base slug — covers all three portal trees consistently. app-page-launchpad class only applied when isHome (overflow:hidden) — correctly removed on inner pages where natural scroll is desired.

Login.jsx — pj_role is read from localStorage to decide /intern vs /app post-login; this relies on AuthContext writing pj_role before navigate fires (80ms setTimeout). Functional but fragile — preferable to read role from the login() return value directly.
Navbar.jsx — 'Sign in' removed from both desktop CTA block and mobile menu as required. Only 'Start Your Project' external CTA + role-aware 'Open Portal' for authed users.
Drawer no longer surfaces 'Marketing site' link — confirmed via DOM scan (drawer-marketing testid absent AND text scan negative).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile viewport 390x844 used for all launchpad checks. Intern login lands on /intern (not /intern/dashboard) per new spec. Admin Launchpad has exactly 3 pages (dots 0/1/2, no dot-3). launch-card-settings appears on page 3 only. main.app-page-launchpad has scrollHeight==clientHeight (no overflow). When opening drawer right after login, wait ~5s for Sonner toast to auto-dismiss so it doesn't intercept app-menu-btn click.
